'''Ezjenk''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] of [[Nebit/Legends|Nebit's]] tribe. He was the tribe's [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]] applier. He wore a cuirass made of [[Woodoo/Legends|woodoo]]-leather. He also put the [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]] on [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
